description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
What's Changed
- docs: fix outdated repository links and spelling error by @ChuwuYo in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1669
- feat: add IAP in native bridge plugin for iOS by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1673
- feat: add IAP server api by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1676
- feat: support IAP to upgrade to Readest Premium on iOS by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1678
- iap: use sandbox environment for testflight by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1679
- api: ensure proper string decoded on edge runtimes by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1680
- api: use node api endpoint for iap verifying by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1683
- fix: importing books from url and set downloaded timestamp for reimported books by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1684
- perf: eliminate redundant re-renders of book cover components by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1685
- chore: suppress warnings from old objc crate by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1686
- font: fix broken links for online CJK fonts by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1687
- layout: fix insets for double borders and add book spine decorator by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1688
- fix: load backup library data if main library data is unavailable, closes #1672 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1689
- perf: multi-part download with range access by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1690
- config: default to open file with new window by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1691
- api: batch updating daily usage key in KV by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1694
- premium: increased cloud sync storage for premium users by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1696
- css: fix hard-coded font color, closes #1695 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1697
- translation: skip translating pre, code and math tags, closes #1693 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1698
- chore: add legal links in about window and user page by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1700
- api: sanitize string before saving into db by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1701
- api: handle more string sanitization by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1702
- txt: more robust TXT parsing by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1706
- release: version 0.9.68 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1707
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.67...v0.9.68
